title: High-Resource NLP Claim
text: We demonstrate that large language models significantly outperform traditional retrieval methods on question answering tasks when fine-tuned on domain-specific corpora. Our experiments assume a high-resource setting with GPU access and clean, well-formatted English text. Results show 12% F1 improvement over BM25 baseline.

title: Low-Resource Counter-Claim
text: We show that retrieval-augmented generation fails to consistently outperform BM25 on low-resource domain-specific tasks. Under limited training data and noisy text inputs, traditional IR methods prove more robust. We assume a low-resource setting with CPU-only infrastructure.
